name: tianming-mobile
description: 天命 Android/平板 Capacitor 壳 — web/ 是源码真源，www/ 是带哈希清单的派生 staging

scripts.sync: npm run stage && cap sync android && npm run verify:native
scripts.copy: npm run stage && cap copy android && npm run verify:native
scripts.open: npm run sync && cap open android
scripts.run: npm run sync && cap run android
scripts.add:android: npm run stage && cap add android && cap sync android && npm run verify:native
